sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_class_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2022-06-05 18:08:23</sys_created_on> <sys_id>e58b4e53db7f49901e1792c5d4961908</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>14</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Awaiting Reassignment Approval</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="Tasker" source="x_153465_discovert">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Tasker">c6b1162d4fc10300303dc3818110c7b1</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters_e58b4e53db7f49901e1792c5d4961908</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-10-24 16:40:40</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_banner_list_page_id>discovertasker_detailsdrilldown</u_banner_list_page_id> <u_banner_list_view_name>sp</u_banner_list_view_name> <u_direction>desc</u_direction> <u_discover_controller_url>false</u_discover_controller_url> <u_field_list/> <u_filter>{"scriptInclude" : "TaskerBannerFilters", "functionName" : "_get_task_requests_awaiting_reassignment_approval", "description" :"This filter loads the list of overdure reassignment requests a given user can see. Task Users see their own, Task Managers see the full Office list, Task Executives and Task Administrators see all open overdure reassignment requests."} </u_filter> <u_filter_label>Awaiting Reassignment Approval</u_filter_label> <u_filter_menu_header>banner_task_requests</u_filter_menu_header> <u_filter_page>my_task_home_page</u_filter_page> <u_hover_field/> <u_include_comments>true</u_include_comments> <u_is_custom_filter>true</u_is_custom_filter> <u_modal_title_field_separator>:</u_modal_title_field_separator> <u_modal_title_fields/> <u_order>200</u_order> <u_order_by>sys_updated_on</u_order_by> <u_show_in_filter_menu>false</u_show_in_filter_menu> <u_table display_value="Task" name="x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance">eabc200ddb0401101e1792c5d4961955</u_table> <u_tooltip/> <u_view_all_page/> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_filters> </record_update>
